MassApply.Label: Mass Apply / Update
MassApply.Tooltip: Apply / update automations for every item under this document.
MassApply.ConfirmPrompt: Apply registered automations to every item under this document? This rewrites their data and cannot be undone.
MassApply.CompendiumPending: Compendium mass apply isn't wired yet - waiting on a pack-aware updater.

Name.Label: Match Name
Name.Hint: Override the name used when matching this item against registered automations.

Identifier.Label: Document Identifier
Identifier.Hint: Item & Activity identifiers must be modified on the respective document sheet.

Source.Label: Automation Source
Source.Hint: Pick which module provides the automation for this document.
Source.HintNone: No automation sources have registered an automation for this document.

Version.Label: Automation Version
Version.Hint: Reported by the selected automation source.

IgnoreItem.Label: Ignore Item
IgnoreItem.Hint: Skip this item during mass apply / update operations.

Embedded.Empty: No embedded macros on this document.

EmbeddedMacros.Title: Embedded Macros: {name}
EmbeddedMacros.Invalid: Macro "{name}" needs a name, event, and pass before saving.
EmbeddedMacros.Duplicate: A macro named "{name}" already exists on this document.

Fields.Name: Name
Fields.ConfigDisabled: Skip If Target Is Config Key

DocProps.Hint: Document properties feed the dnd5e patches (alternate formulas, abilities, and roll modifiers).
DocProps.Duplicate: An entry for identifier "{name}" already exists.
DocProps.IdentifierHint: The identifier of the item this entry applies to.

alternateFormula.Title: Alternate Formula: {name}
alternateFormula.Label: Alternate Formula
alternateFormula.Hint: Roll formula offered as an alternative; the highest-rolling option is used.
alternateFormula.IdentifiersHint: Comma-separated target identifiers this formula applies to (item|activity).

otherAbilities.Label: Other Abilities
otherAbilities.Hint: Extra abilities this attack may use.

rollModifiers.Title: Roll Modifier: {name}
rollModifiers.Label: Roll Modifiers
rollModifiers.ModifiersHint: Comma-separated dice modifiers (e.g. x, min1, kh1).
rollModifiers.Invalid: At least one modifier is required.

Restrictions.Hint: Leave a restriction empty to skip it. Comma-separate free-form values.

Unavailable.Heading: No automation registered
Unavailable.Copy: No source provides automation for this item.

Footer.SaveTooltip: Commit pending changes; keep the window open.
Footer.DiscardPrompt: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and close?

RulesToggle.NotApplicable: Rules selection not applicable for this document.

Configuration.None: No configurable options for this automation.

behavior.Label: Behavior
behavior.Tooltip: How the automation triggers and what it applies.

tuning.Label: Tuning
tuning.Tooltip: Numeric and selection tuning for the automation.

visuals.Label: Visuals
visuals.Tooltip: Icons, images, and other visual hooks.

Documents.Placeholder: Paste UUID or drag a document here
Documents.InvalidUuid: No document found for that UUID.

MagicalDarkness.Label: Magical Darkness
MagicalDarkness.Hint: Tokens inside this region are blocked from non-magical light sources.

Obscured.Label: Obscured
Obscured.Hint: Tokens inside this region are heavily obscured.

Name.Label: Match Name
Name.Hint: Override the name used when matching this actor (typically NPCs) against registered automations.

IgnoreActor.Label: Ignore Actor
IgnoreActor.Hint: Skip this actor during mass compendium / scene updates.

ConditionResistance.Label: Condition Resistance
ConditionResistance.Hint: Conditions this actor has resistance to. Click All for any save, or pick specific abilities to scope it.

ConditionVulnerability.Label: Condition Vulnerability
ConditionVulnerability.Hint: Conditions this actor has vulnerability to. Click All for any save, or pick specific abilities to scope it.

Hidden.Label: Hidden Activity
Hidden.Hint: Hide this activity from the activity-use selection dialog.

PlacedRegion.Hint: Configuration applied to any region this activity creates.

Effects.Label: Region Effects
Effects.Hint: Effects from this item applied to tokens inside a region this activity creates.
Effects.None: This item has no effects to apply.

RegionMacros.Label: Region Registered Macros
RegionMacros.Hint: Registered macros copied onto a region this activity creates.

Activities.Label: Region Activities
Activities.Hint: Activities from this item that fire when tokens interact with a region this activity creates.
Activities.NoneAvailable: This item has no other activities to trigger.

Conditions.Label: Conditions
Conditions.Hint: Conditions applied to the actor while this effect is active.

SpecialDuration.Label: Special Durations
SpecialDuration.Hint: Triggers that automatically remove this effect.

NoAnimation.Label: Disable Animation
NoAnimation.Hint: Suppress effect apply/remove animations for this effect.

Picker.Label: Registered Macros
Picker.Hint: Select which registered macros run on this document. Each picked macro fires for every event it declares.

Macros.None: No macros are registered in the global registry.

Automation.Name: Automation Source Priority
Automation.Label: Open
Automation.Hint: Choose which automation sources are enabled and their priority order (lowest number wins).

AutomationSources.Name: Automation Sources
AutomationSources.Hint: Enabled automation sources and their priority order (lowest number wins).

Compendiums.Name: Additional Compendiums
Compendiums.Label: Open
Compendiums.Hint: Choose extra Item compendiums to use as automation sources.

AdditionalCompendiums.Name: Additional Compendiums
AdditionalCompendiums.Hint: Item compendiums (excluding registered automation modules) used as automation sources, with their priority.

DisplayDebugLogs.Name: Display Debug Logs
DisplayDebugLogs.Hint: When enabled, the console will show debug logs.

HideNames.Name: Hide Token Names
HideNames.Hint: Whene enabled, various dialogs will not show enemy token names.

DiceSoNice.Name: Dice So Nice Compatibility
DiceSoNice.Hint: When enabled, Dice So Nice damage roll animations will be delayed until after all damage roll macros are complete.

EffectDescriptions.Name: Automatic Effect Descriptions
EffectDescriptions.Hint: When enabled, effects without descriptions will automatically be filled in from the origin item.

EffectDescriptionsNPC.Name: Hide NPC Effect Descriptions
EffectDescriptionsNPC.Hint: When enabled, the Automatic Effect Description setting will not apply for NPC created effects.

CV.Name: {condition} Condition Vulnerability
CV.Description: Condition Vulnerability to {condition}, roll at disadvantage to save. 1/true for all saves, or a comma-separated list of abilities (e.g. str,dex).

CR.Name: {condition} Condition Resistance
CR.Description: Condition Resistance to {condition}, roll at advantage to save. 1/true for all saves, or a comma-separated list of abilities (e.g. str,dex).
